author: Warren Reed Baum
name: Autoresearch 8L 512d — RTX 4090
blurb: Non-record submission: 8-layer, 512d model with value embeddings, SSSL sliding window attention, 8192 BPE vocab. Autoresearch framework (nanochat). Achieved 1.3718 bpb on single RTX 4090 in ~5 min wallclock (107 steps, 300s training budget). Value embeddings (16.7M params) + wider vocab beat deeper stacking and MLP3x at this scale.
